2603.14647.title: TopoCL: Topological Contrastive Learning for Medical Imaging
2603.14647.paper_summary: Contrastive learning (CL) has become a powerful approach for learning representations from unlabeled images. However, existing CL methods focus predominantly on visual appearance features while neglecting topological characteristics (e.g., connectivity patterns, boundary configurations, cavity formations) that provide valuable cues for medical image analysis. To address this limitation, we propose a new topological CL framework (TopoCL) that explicitly exploits topological structures during contrastive learning for medical imaging. Specifically, we first introduce topology-aware augmentations that control topological perturbations using a relative bottleneck distance between persistence diagrams, preserving medically relevant topological properties while enabling controlled structural variations. We then design a Hierarchical Topology Encoder that captures topological features through self-attention and cross-attention mechanisms. Finally, we develop an adaptive mixture-of-experts (MoE) module to dynamically integrate visual and topological representations. TopoCL can be seamlessly integrated with existing CL methods. We evaluate TopoCL on five representative CL methods (SimCLR, MoCo-v3, BYOL, DINO, and Barlow Twins) and five diverse medical image classification datasets. The experimental results show that TopoCL achieves consistent improvements: an average gain of +3.26% in linear probe classification accuracy with strong statistical significance, verifying its effectiveness.
2603.14647.paper_summary_zh: 對比學習（CL）已成為從未標記圖像中學習表示的一種強大方法。<lb/>然而，現有的 CL 方法主要集中在視覺外觀特徵上，而忽略了提供醫學影像分析寶貴線索的拓撲特徵（例如，連通模式、邊界配置、空腔形成）。<lb/>為了解決這一限制，我們提出了一種新的拓撲 CL 框架（TopoCL），該框架在醫學影像的對比學習中明確利用拓撲結構。<lb/>具體而言，我們首先介紹了拓撲感知增強，通過持續圖之間的相對瓶頸距離來控制拓撲擾動，保留醫學相關的拓撲特性，同時實現受控的結構變化。<lb/>然後，我們設計了一個層次拓撲編碼器，通過自注意力和交叉注意力機制捕捉拓撲特徵。<lb/>最後，我們開發了一個自適應專家混合（MoE）模塊，以動態整合視覺和拓撲表示。<lb/>TopoCL 可以與現有的 CL 方法無縫集成。<lb/>我們在五種代表性的 CL 方法（SimCLR、MoCo-v3、BYOL、DINO 和 Barlow Twins）以及五個多樣的醫學影像分類數據集上評估了 TopoCL。<lb/>實驗結果表明，TopoCL 實現了一致的改進：在線性探針分類準確率上平均增益 +3.26%，且具有強烈的統計顯著性，驗證了其有效性。
2603.14647.author: Guangyu Meng et.al.
2603.14647.authors: Guangyu Meng, Pengfei Gu, Peixian Liang, John P. Lalor, Erin Wolf Chambers, Danny Z. Chen
